name: 10q11_22_NCOA4_Cooper_SD
description: 10q11.22 NCOA4-centric Cooper-described pericentromeric SD cluster harbouring NCOA4, BMS1, ANXA8/ANXA8L1/2, NPY4R and FAM35 paralog families. Recurrently expanded SDs cause one of the densest pericentromeric SD pile-ups in the genome.

architecture.internal_structure: Mosaic of 10-200 kb duplicons at 96-99% identity; multiple paralog copies of NCOA4, ANXA8, BMS1, NPY4R; >50% of region in SDs.
